objective: Implement Slice G of Epic #650 by adding 5 governance process-agent persona JSON files with a validated schema, updating PersonaLoader to prefer process-agents/, and implementing AnthropicApiProvider with early API key enforcement.
scope_boundary: Create packages/hldpro-sim/process-agents/ with governance-process-persona.schema.json and 5 persona files.
Update packages/hldpro-sim/hldprosim/personas.py so PersonaLoader prefers process-agents/ over bundled legacy personas.
Update packages/hldpro-sim/hldprosim/providers.py so AnthropicApiProvider raises ValueError at __init__ when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is unset.
Update test suite for the new behaviors.
Create all required issue-local governance artifacts.
out_of_scope: Editing STANDARDS.md, workflow files, hooks, scripts outside packages/hldpro-sim.
Closing the parent epic or changing non-slice governance policy.
research_summary: Slice G extends hldpro-sim with five governance process-agent persona definitions (governance-planner, implementation-worker, plan-reviewer, qa-reviewer, functional-acceptance-auditor) and a JSON Schema contract. PersonaLoader is updated to prefer the new process-agents/ directory over the legacy bundled registry. AnthropicApiProvider is hardened to raise ValueError at __init__ time when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is unset, matching the fail-fast policy established in STANDARDS.md §PDCAR.

sprints.name: Governance Personas + Provider Hardening
sprints.goal: Add 5 governance process-agent persona files with schema, update PersonaLoader, harden AnthropicApiProvider, and file all governance evidence.
tasks: Create 5 persona JSON files under process-agents/
Update PersonaLoader to prefer process-agents/ directory
Update AnthropicApiProvider to raise ValueError at __init__ when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset
Update and add tests for all new behaviors
Create all governance artifacts (plan, scope, handoff, validation, closeout, cross-review)
acceptance_criteria: AC-G1: process-agents/ has 5+ governance persona JSON files
AC-G2: governance-process-persona.schema.json validates all persona files
AC-G3: PersonaLoader prefers process-agents/ over bundled personas
AC-G5: AnthropicApiProvider raises ValueError at __init__ when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify AC-G1 through AC-G5 against implementation artifacts
specialist_reviews.summary: gpt-5.4 QA APPROVED. AC-G1 PASS (5 persona files), AC-G2 PASS (schema validates), AC-G3 PASS (PersonaLoader prefers process-agents/), AC-G5 PASS (ValueError at __init__).

material_deviation_rules: Any edit outside the allowed_write_paths is a material deviation.
Any change to STANDARDS.md, hooks, workflows, scripts, agents/, or docs/schemas/ is a material deviation.
Any persona JSON file that does not validate against governance-process-persona.schema.json is a material deviation.
Any AnthropicApiProvider that does not raise ValueError at __init__ when key unset is a material deviation.

alternate_model_review.summary: OpenAI-family QA reviewed implementation. AC-G1, AC-G2, AC-G3, AC-G5 all PASS. PersonaLoader prefers process-agents/; AnthropicApiProvider raises ValueError at __init__.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement hldpro-sim process-agent personas, schema, PersonaLoader update, AnthropicApiProvider early key enforcement, and governance artifacts.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Create process-agents/ files, update providers.py and personas.py, run pytest, file governance artifacts.
